title: Christmas Hat 🎅🎄
description: Bring the Christmas spirit to Minecraft with a unique twist! With the Christmas Hat texture pack, simply rename a carved pumpkin to "christmas_hat," and it magically transforms into a festive Santa hat.
body:
Bring the Christmas spirit to Minecraft with a unique twist! With the Christmas Hat texture pack, simply rename a carved pumpkin to "christmas_hat," and it magically transforms into a festive Santa hat.

Get into the holiday mood with the Christmas Hat texture pack, designed to add a special touch to your seasonal celebrations. All it takes is renaming a carved pumpkin to "christmas_hat" to wear or share a stylish Christmas hat in your Minecraft adventures.

![How to make](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/379238b6e593d389706d779f313828eb8945f376.png)

🎅 Easy to use: just rename a carved pumpkin.
🎄 Perfect for holiday-themed worlds or events.
✨ Brings joy and festive fun to your Minecraft experience.

Download now and spread the Christmas magic across your blocky world!

### Optifine Required

![Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c64b0bd63b40370350ad191d519fc44e497dc4c8_0.webp)
